title: Ethical Gift Cards
description: Which online gift cards are best for purchasing at ethical, ecological, and solidarity‑focused businesses?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative overview of gift cards that are explicitly linked to eco‑friendly and socially responsible retailers. They want information about digital availability, activation steps, validity period, usage restrictions (e.g., local stores only vs. online), and price points. Relevance will be judged by whether the document explains suitability for ethical merchants, provides purchase details, and covers how the card can be used in real‑world scenarios.

title: CdP Pairing Guide
description: What are the best Châteauneuf‑du‑Pape wines to pair with roasted lamb and Moroccan tagine?
narrative: The user is planning a dinner featuring roasted lamb and Moroccan tagine and wants a curated list of Châteauneuf‑du‑Pape red wines that are appropriate for such dishes. Relevance requires detailed information on specific vintages, producers, grape composition, tasting notes that highlight herbal or gamey character, aging potential, and explicit pairing suggestions. Documents focusing on general overviews of the appellation without particular wine or pairing guidance are considered less relevant.

title: Lotus Carignan Search
description: What used Lotus models are listed for sale in Carignan, Quebec, and which common mechanical issues are noted by owners?
narrative: The user is a prospective buyer seeking available Lotus vehicles in the Carignan area and wants to evaluate both market listings and owner-reported maintenance or performance problems. Relevance therefore hinges on documents that mention Lotus cars for sale in Carignan and forum posts detailing operational issues, fixes, or troubleshooting tips related to those models.

title: Paupiettes Mushroom
description: I need a complete recipe for veal paupiettes with mushrooms, including ingredients, steps, timing, and possible sauce variations.
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, step‑by‑step cooking guide that covers ingredient quantities, preparation, cooking process, alternative ingredients or substitutions, and serving suggestions, with an emphasis on authentic French culinary style.

title: Baby Sun Protection
description: Which baby sunscreen offers comprehensive UV protection while being safe for sensitive skin?
narrative: The user is looking for recommendations on sunscreens suitable for babies and children that provide high SPF (at least 15), broad-spectrum UVA/UVB coverage, hypoallergenic and non-toxic formulations (no parabens, no harmful chemical filters, preferably mineral or organic ingredients), and that are non-irritating and suitable for pediatric use. Relevance depends on products meeting these safety and protection criteria.

title: RA Eye Symptoms
description: What are the ocular manifestations of rheumatoid arthritis and how can they be distinguished from other autoimmune conditions?
narrative: The user seeks a concise medical explanation of eye complications associated with rheumatoid arthritis, including specific anterior and posterior‑segment lesions, treatment‑related changes, and comparison points with lupus or other vasculitides. Relevance requires authoritative medical descriptions, definitions of each sign, and clinical differentiators.

title: Collaborative Economy Taxation
description: What are the tax obligations and thresholds for income earned from collaborative economy platforms in France?
narrative: The user is an individual or small business operating within France who generates revenue from services such as short‑term accommodation, car rentals, or other marketplace‑based activities. They need to understand how French tax law treats this income, including which earnings are taxable, what exemption thresholds apply (e.g., €7,720 for movable goods and €23,000 for real estate), the role of social security contributions, how to correctly file annual statements, and the procedural requirements regarding reporting to the tax administration. Relevance is judged by how well documents explain statutory provisions, thresholds, reporting deadlines, and the distinctions between exempt cooperative activities and taxable income.

title: Boys in Schools
description: What films can a teacher use to explore boys' experiences, gender dynamics, and educational practice in a classroom setting?
narrative: A secondary educator seeks audiovisual resources that focus on male students, gender identity, and school culture. Relevance requires titles explicitly involving boys’ perspectives, discussions of masculinity, or gender bias in education, and, whenever feasible, court‑cleared segments or accompanying pedagogical materials that facilitate lesson planning. The topic targets films, documentaries, and short works listed in the provided compilation that address boys (or male students) and can be used to stimulate classroom dialogue or writing assignments.

title: Right of Option Analysis
description: What are the conditions and benefits of exercising the right of option on my remaining ARE entitlements, and how will it affect my future unemployment benefits and job transitions?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on when and how to exercise the right of option for unemployment benefits in the French system. They want to compare the duration and daily amounts of current unexpired ARE rights with proposed new rights, assess eligibility criteria (e.g., higher rate, minimum 30% increase, at least four months worked, non‑exhaustion of prior rights), and understand implications such as loss of older benefits, increased immediacy of higher payments, and interaction with future employment or entrepreneurship. Relevance hinges on documents that explain eligibility conditions, benefit calculations, and scenarios where the option provides a higher total benefit or better cash flow during job transitions. The answer should include real‑world examples, step‑by‑step evaluation, and references to official guidelines.

title: Detached House Compliance
description: What steps are required to build a detached house in France that meets RT2012 standards and how do I use the builder’s client space?
narrative: The user is planning to construct a new detached house in France and wants a comprehensive, step‑by‑step guide. They need to understand the legal and regulatory framework – especially the RT2012 thermal regulations – the contract process with a builder (e.g., LMP Constructeur), the guarantees and warranties that must be secured, and how to navigate and make use of the online client space for project monitoring and document access. Relevant relevance criteria include descriptions of land selection, house plan approval, thermal study and certification, contract terms (CCMI), payment schedules, guarantee details (10‑year structural and 2‑year functional), and instructions for accessing and using the client portal.

title: EV Purchase Criteria
description: What factors should I consider when selecting an electric car that fits my budget and driving habits?
narrative: The user seeks a detailed comparison of current electric vehicle options, focusing on range, pricing, battery ownership versus leasing arrangements, charging infrastructure availability, and vehicle type (city car, SUV, sedan), to determine the best fit for a moderate daily commute and an urban lifestyle.

title: Downy Mildew Management
description: What integrated strategies are recommended for controlling downy mildew in European potato production, covering genetics, chemicals, precision tools, and cultural practices?
narrative: The user is a potato farmer or crop scientist seeking comprehensive, up‑to‑date information on integrated disease management for downy mildew (Phytophthora).  Relevance criteria include: 1) discussion of resistant varieties and breeding programs; 2) recommendations on chemical and biocontrol options, including translaminar and systemic products; 3) inclusion of decision‑support tools (e.g., Mileos) and precision‑farming practices; 4) practical cultural controls such as planting density, soil pH, and irrigation management; 5) references to recent research, congress findings, or policy developments in Europe.  Documents that only touch on a single aspect or lack actionable recommendations are considered less relevant.

title: New Earth Mapping
description: How can I identify and explore geographic locations that exemplify the biblical and spiritual concept of a "New Earth" using tools like Google Earth?
narrative: The user is a researcher interested in the intersection of biblical prophecy, contemporary spirituality, and geographic visualization. They want documents that explain the "New Earth" concept as detailed by authors such as Eckhart Tolle, along with instructions or data sets that can be loaded into Google Earth to locate relevant sites (e.g., biblical landmarks, modern environmental restoration projects, or symbols of renewal). Relevance requires inclusion of spiritual texts, geographic coordinates, or guidance on using Google Earth to illustrate these ideas.

title: Workplace Mental Health Return Programs
description: Which resources, research, and best‑practice models exist for designing and implementing integrated return‑to‑work programs for employees after mental‑health‑related absences?
narrative: An HR manager seeks evidence‑based guidance on creating a structured return‑to‑work pathway that addresses mental‑health needs, including policy frameworks, stakeholder collaboration, and case studies (e.g., Areva and Schwing‑Stetter). The user values peer‑reviewed research, concrete program designs, and implementation examples that can be tailored to an organization’s context.

title: Bike Park Video Promotion
description: What are the best practices and tools for promoting a bike park video on Instagram and Facebook?
narrative: The user is a marketing professional tasked with promoting a newly filmed video of the Serre Chevalier Bike Park. They need guidance on creating engaging Instagram stories, designing a Facebook campaign, selecting appropriate camera angles and rider styles, and measuring impact with analytics. Relevance criteria include content on video production for mountain‑bike audiences, social‑media strategy, audience engagement metrics, and best‑practice examples from the Serre Chevalier case.

title: IOC Ukrainian Aid
description: What actions has the International Olympic Committee taken to support Ukraine during the Russian invasion?
narrative: The user seeks detailed information about the role of the IOC in coordinating humanitarian support for Ukraine, including statements from IOC President Thomas Bach, the involvement of Serguei (Sergei) Bubka—the Ukrainian National Olympic Committee president—and any initiatives or funding arrangements facilitated by the IOC headquarters. Relevant documents must mention the Olympic family’s response to the conflict, the coordination efforts from Lausanne, and specific aid measures undertaken. Content that merely references the war or unrelated Olympic events is not pertinent.}

title: Biomimicry for Territories
description: What practical methods can territorial authorities use to incorporate biomimicry into local development and anchorage strategies?
narrative: A regional manager seeks to design a training program for local stakeholders and policymakers that leverages biomimicry principles. The user wants details on program structures (e.g., Master Class duration, session types), successful case studies (such as the Biovallée transitional territory project), target audience lists, expected outcomes, and actionable steps that can be applied to their own region. Relevance criteria include the inclusion of evidence of similar training initiatives, concrete examples of biomimicry application in territorial settings, and resources that guide the design and execution of such programs.

title: Monalisa vs Amandine
description: How do Monalisa and Princess Amandine potato varieties compare in agronomic traits, resistances, and culinary suitability?
narrative: The user wants a detailed comparison between these two French potato varieties to guide both farming decisions (yield, disease resistance, growth characteristics) and cooking choices (texture, flavor profile, suitable recipes). Relevant documents are those that provide quantitative yield data, resistance scores, and culinary applications for either variety.

title: Municipal Citizen Portal Login
description: What steps are needed to access my city’s ‘Espace Citoyen’ platform and retrieve administrative documents such as a vaccination pass or passport renewal?
narrative: The user is a resident seeking to log into their local citizen portal, usually provided by their city or region, to perform various administrative tasks (e.g., download a vaccine certificate, register for schools, or renew identification). They need instructions on creating an account, receiving login credentials, navigating the portal, and accessing specific services. Relevance should include up‑to‑date procedures, multilingual support, and examples of both French municipal portals and the Tunisian Evax system, while disregarding non‑citizen or unrelated online forums.

title: Evaluating Ohm Energy Tariffs
description: What are the pros and cons of Ohm Energy's electricity plans compared to EDF and other suppliers, especially for small or off‑peak users?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive comparison of Ohm Energy's offers, including pricing, commitment terms, eligibility (Linky meter), consumption thresholds, green energy options, and customer service quality, to determine suitability for a household that uses less than 1000 kWh or has a second home.

title: Porsche 911 Condition
description: Seek a used Porsche 911 Carrera 4 PDK 350CH in excellent condition, with carnet a jour and a 1‑year guarantee, from France.
narrative: The user wants to purchase a pre‑owned Porsche 911 Carrera 4 PDK 350CH, specifically the 3.4‑liter, 350 CH model. They require a fully documented ownership history (carnet a jour), a 1‑year warranty, and a top‑configuration build including all specified equipment (lane‑change assistance, parking aid, leather seats, opening roof, etc.). Relevance is determined by documents that list this exact model, its specifications, condition, price, geographic origin, and any additional features or certification details.

title: Gallic Rooster Significance
description: What is the historical and contemporary significance of the Gallic rooster symbol in French national identity, and how is it used across different contexts such as currency, government insignia, monuments, sports emblems, and popular media?
narrative: The user seeks an overview of the symbol's origins, its appearance on various artifacts and symbols (10/20/50 franc coins, mayor's badge, gates of the Élysée, sports jerseys, monuments to the dead), exploration of its role in cultural propaganda, and its presence in popular media (e.g., animated series featuring Idéfix). Relevance criteria include documents that provide historically accurate descriptions of the rooster’s usage, official decrees or descriptions, and contextual information linking the symbol to national identity and specific mediums.

title: Cross-Border Family Rentals
description: What are the most affordable car rental options that include child booster seat availability in Lisbon, Angra (Brazil), and Wagga Wagga (Australia)?
narrative: The user plans a multi‑destination trip with a child and seeks economical rental vehicles that provide a booster seat. They need clear information on price comparison, pickup logistics, and whether the seat can be requested in advance or must be sourced at the location. Documents that detail pricing, child‑safety services, and easy booking processes for these three cities are considered relevant.

title: Hypermarket vs Specialist Van Hire
description: How can I identify the most affordable and suitable van rental by comparing hypermarket offers with specialist car hire services?
narrative: The user intends to evaluate vehicle rental options—especially vans—for a specific trip (e.g., family holiday, business travel, or moving). Relevance requires documents that compare prices, fleet availability, location proximity, age and one‑way restrictions, insurance and extra‑fee details, and user reviews or ratings across both large retail (Carrefour, Leclerc, Intermarché, Système U) and dedicated rental agencies (Europcar, Hertz, ALAMO, etc.).

title: Historical vs Modern Potatoes
description: What are the long‑term effects of the transatlantic potato trade on European agriculture and how do contemporary pathogens like downy mildew influence current food safety?
narrative: The user seeks to connect two seemingly disjointed time periods: the 19th‑century potato crisis in Flanders, driven by the introduction of Andean varieties and the spread of Phytophthora infestans, with modern concerns over the consumption of tomatoes and potatoes infected with downy mildew. Relevant documents should discuss (1) the economic, ecological, and demographic consequences of the early micro‑culture of potatoes in Flanders, (2) the mechanisms of transatlantic disease transfer and the impact on European famines, and (3) present‑day safety guidelines for eating or storing produce affected by downy mildew as well as the toxic potential of green or damaged tubers. The narrative therefore defines relevance as literature that links historical agricultural crises with contemporary disease management, providing both socio‑historical context and practical health advice.

title: Beaujolaise Oil Culinary
description: Identify suitable dishes and flavor pairings for Beaujolaise oil varieties.
narrative: The user seeks detailed culinary guidance on Beaujolaise oils—specific flavor notes, recommended uses in sauces, marinades, and dishes, and how they pair with ingredients like meats, seafood, and spices. Relevant documents describe distinct Beaujolaise product types, their tasting profiles, and recipe suggestions or application guidelines; content that merely mentions general olive oil or unrelated products is considered irrelevant.

title: Kids Waterproof Boots
description: What are the essential qualities to consider when selecting lightweight, flexible, insulated rain boots for a child, especially for boating activities?
narrative: The user is a parent searching for suitable rain boots for their child that provide protection against water, keep feet warm, are comfortable during movement, and are easy to don and remove. Relevant information includes concrete details about boot size, weight, sole flexibility, thermal insulation (e.g., neoprene or liner), waterproofing performance, calf fit, slip‑resistance, and maintenance guidelines. Documents that describe these attributes in the context of children’s rain or boating boots will satisfy the user's intent.

title: Trim Replacement Cost
description: What is the price and quality comparison for replacing rim trim on a Renault Modus?
narrative: The user is looking to understand the financial and practical aspects of removing damaged or unwanted rim embellishments from a Renault Modus and installing either original or aftermarket trim. Relevance will be judged by documents that provide price ranges, sizing details (e.g., rim diameter 14‑16 in), replacement guidance, and considerations for resale value. Information on tools, installation steps, and durability of different trim materials will also be pertinent.

title: Terranuova Car Rental
description: What are the best long‑term car rental options around Terranuova Bracciolini, Italy, that fit a specific budget and include comprehensive insurance, zero hidden fees, and flexible drop‑off points?
narrative: I need a monthly car rental near Terranuova Bracciolini, Italy, within a budget cap (e.g., €300/month), that includes full insurance coverage, no hidden charges, and allows multiple return locations. The vehicle should be a recent model (2018+), preferably a compact or SUV, with a reasonable mileage limit and optional features such as GPS and child seat included. I also want clear information on cancellation policy and whether an additional driver can be added at a reasonable cost.

title: Used Renault Kangoo Search
description: I need to find a used Renault Kangoo Express in good condition with low mileage, affordable price, preferably in France.
narrative: The user is looking for a second‑hand Renault Kangoo Express (or Express/Kangoo models) and wants documents or listings that provide reliable price, mileage, vehicle condition, seller reputation, and location information (ideally within France). Relevance is indicated by listings that include full vehicle details, recent photos, and transparent pricing. Non‑relevant results are generic advertisements, unrelated car models, or listings lacking clear vehicle specifics.

title: Lincoln Labour Views
description: Which labor and socialist aspects of Abraham Lincoln’s legacy are omitted from Spielberg’s film 'Lincoln'?
narrative: The user is looking for scholarly evidence and primary sources that reveal Lincoln’s sympathy for socialist labor movements, his involvement with labor organizations, and the way he linked emancipation with worker rights. Relevance requires discussion of the film’s portrayal gaps, references to Marx, red Republicans and other primary documents that support these claims.

title: Motorcycle Insurance Comparison
description: I’m looking for the most affordable motorcycle insurance options that still provide comprehensive coverage.
narrative: I want to evaluate the cheapest yet most reliable insurance plans for my motorcycle.  The search should show comparable quotes, highlight coverage details such as third‑party liability, collision, theft, and breakdown assistance, outline any discounts for safe driving, low mileage or bundling, and explain how deductible options affect the premium.  Relevant results should also include guidance on the impact of past accident claims and how policy terms affect claims handling.

title: Vienna Kursalon Packages
description: What concert and dinner package options are offered at the Kursalon in Vienna, including dates, times, menu details, drinks, and pricing categories?
narrative: The user wants to compare the available concert-dinner combos at the Kursalon venue, needing clear information on schedules, course counts, drink inclusion, and cost for each ticket category to decide the best option. Relevant documents are those that list the specific packages, their event dates, times, menu descriptions, and price breakdowns for VIP, Category A, B, and C tickets.

title: Joué‑lès‑Tours cycle route
description: Which 5‑day cycle routes include Joué‑lès‑Tours and use low‑traffic roads?
narrative: I plan a multi‑day bicycle tour through the Loire region. I need routes that pass through Joué‑lès‑Tours, are officially designated (EuroVelo or La Loire à vélo), and mainly run on roads with fewer than 500 vehicles per day. The route should have detailed maps or guides available.

title: KRAS Lung Subtypes
description: Which molecular subtypes exist within KRAS‑mutant lung adenocarcinoma and what biomarkers distinguish them?
narrative: A clinical researcher wants a comprehensive, evidence‑based overview of the KRAS‑mutant lung adenocarcinoma subgroups (KP, KL, KC).  The user seeks up‑to‑date primary studies, systematic reviews, and clinical trial reports published on or after 2019 that describe the co‑occurring genetic events (TP53, STK11/LKB1, CDKN2A/B), low TTF‑1 expression, and candidate biomarker panels used to differentiate these subtypes.  Relevance requires detailed molecular characterization, discussion of biomarker validation techniques, and any emerging targeted therapeutic strategies specific to each subgroup.  Non‑clinical or pre‑2019 literature, studies that do not explicitly address the KP/KL/KC classification, or articles lacking peer‑reviewed data are considered irrelevant.

title: Public Office Transfer
description: What steps and fees are involved in legally transferring a public or ministerial office in France, including registration requirements and government approval?
narrative: The user seeks detailed procedural guidance—document types, timelines, registration fees, and approval conditions—for transferring a public office, so only sources citing the French tax code, council regulations, and pertinent case law are considered relevant.

title: Silver Print Chemistry
description: How to choose and use chemical agents when developing traditional silver prints to produce unique images.
narrative: The user is an experienced photographer interested in reviving the tactile craft of silver photography. They want to learn how to set up a working darkroom or lab, select appropriate silver halide emulsions and chemicals (developers, fixers, sensitizers), control process parameters such as temperature, pH, and exposure, and ultimately create photographs that convey uniqueness rather than mass production. Relevant information should cover lab equipment and workflow, chemical safety and handling, historical and contemporary techniques for achieving unique tonal qualities, and practical guidance for beginners or seasoned practitioners seeking to expand or refine their silver printing practice.

title: Disruptive Leek Cooking
description: What innovative, disruptive methods and technologies exist for preparing leeks in modern culinary dishes?
narrative: The user is a chef or culinary researcher looking to break away from traditional sautéing or boiling and explore novel, possibly science-based techniques—such as electric, microwave, or pressurized methods—that dramatically alter the texture, flavor, or presentation of leeks. Relevant documents should mention innovative or disruptive preparation techniques for leeks, describe the tools or processes used, and provide evidence or examples of successful outcome. Non‑relevant materials that only discuss standard recipes, basic blanching, or generic cooking tips without any mention of disruptive or cutting‑edge methods should be excluded.

title: Free Kids Car Games
description: What free online car games are available for children that cover racing, stunts, and various vehicle types?
narrative: The user wants a list of child‑friendly car games that are freely accessible online, including rally, circuit, motorcycle, truck, and stunt categories. Relevant documents should identify titles, platforms, and brief descriptions, excluding paid or adult‑oriented content.

title: Mobility Budget Calculation
description: How do employers calculate the employee mobility budget considering alternative transport options and tax implications?
narrative: An HR professional or payroll specialist needs a concise, step‑by‑step guide to compute the mobility budget for employees who are transitioning from a company car. The information should cover: 1) the methodology for determining the budget based on the vehicle the employee is replacing (gross annual cost minus employee contribution); 2) distribution across the three legal pillars (environmentally friendly vehicle, sustainable transport options, cash balance); 3) eligibility and duration conditions for both employer and employee; and 4) withholding of tax benefits per pillar. Relevance is judged by the presence of explicit calculation formulas, descriptions of the three pillars, eligibility clauses, and tax treatment explanations.

title: Ophir Shuttle Collaboration
description: Which nations participated in the Ophir space shuttle launch and what were its mission objectives?
narrative: The user wants a detailed overview of the joint space launch described in the NationStates scenario, including which countries were represented, the stated goals of the mission (e.g., reactivating satellites, research on orbital debris), and any diplomatic statements or implications that followed. Relevance requires documents that mention the launch event, involve at least one of the nations (Acasian, North Ophir, Euphemian, etc.), explicitly list objectives, and provide contextual diplomatic commentary.

title: Oil Blue Bed Lamps
description: Which oil‑blue petroleum lamps are suitable for a bedroom and available for purchase online?
narrative: The user is looking to acquire an oil‑blue petroleum lamp to use at a bedside or as a decorative table lamp. They specifically want lamps that feature the characteristic oil‑blue finish, a flat or conical base suitable for table placement or wall‑mounting, and that are readily available through online retailers. Relevance is judged by product descriptions that mention the oil‑blue coloration, mention household use such as bedrooms or living rooms, provide size or base details, and include purchase or delivery information.

title: Car Rental Portugal
description: I want to rent a car at Porto Airport and need the best deal that includes a child seat, insurance, fuel policy, and pick‑up/return times.
narrative: The user is traveling to Porto and must pick up a rental car from the airport. They want a concise comparison of available suppliers (e.g., Guerin, Eurocar, Avis), focusing on the lowest daily rate, guaranteed model availability, acceptance of debit cards for online booking while requiring a credit card on pick‑up, the ability to add a child seat, optional insurance, and the fuel refund policy. The user also cares about pick‑up and drop‑off times, flexible cancellation options, and overall customer ratings. Relevant documents include detailed pricing, supplier ratings, and FAQs about booking procedures and insurance.

title: Potato Soil Prep
description: What soil preparation practices and equipment improve potato crop yield and disease resistance in modern agriculture?
narrative: The user seeks evidence‑based recommendations for soil grading, rock removal, deep tillage, and the use of modern machinery, with emphasis on moisture management, crop rotation impacts, and technical specs of recommended equipment. Relevance should include peer‑reviewed sources, case studies, and precision agriculture solutions that demonstrate measurable improvements in tuber size and quality.

title: Eligibility for French Employment Bonus
description: What are the eligibility criteria and application steps for the French employment bonus and related tax incentives?
narrative: The user is a job seeker or employer seeking detailed information on who qualifies for the French government’s employment bonus (PEP/PEP), including income and family status thresholds, the timing of the last payout, how the bonus interacts with tax returns, refund procedures, and any associated tax cuts or allowances. Relevant documents should outline tax brackets, bonus amounts, application methods, and policy context.
